title: phegopteris aneitensis
intro: Phegopteris aneitensis is a species of fern native to New Caledonia, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, known for its anti-inflammatory properties, which are thought to be derived from its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The medicinal properties of Phegopteris aneitensis have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing swelling and pain, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Phegopteris aneitensis is commonly prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
